shot_01.png.source: wikem.org (NOT STAT EM — included for Broselow color reference)
shot_01.png.content: Pediatric weight/age by Broselow color: Green 35kg/10yr, Orange 25kg/8yr, Blue 20kg/6yr, White 15kg/4yr, Yellow 12kg/2yr, Purple 10kg/1yr, Red 8kg/6mo, Pink 6kg/4mo, Gray 5kg/2mo and 3.5kg/newborn, Preemie 2kg

shot_02.png.content: Two tabs: 'age' (selected) and 'birthday'. Wheel pickers for years and months. Currently set to 0 years 0 months = 'new born'

shot_03.webp.content: Visible: Pain Management, Pressure Support, Procedural Sedation, Respiratory, Seizure/Status Epilepticus, Shock, Toxicology, Trauma, CODE SHEET, EMSC/EIIC. Bottom bar: 10.0 kg, 0y 11m, 76.0 cm, Favorites. Search bar at top.

shot_04.webp.content: Visible: Burns, Cardiac Resuscitation, Equipment, Fever, Fluid/Blood Resuscitation, Glasgow Coma Scale, Hypoglycemia, Pain Management, Pressure Support, Procedural Sedation. Bottom: 10.0 kg, 0y 11m, 76.0 cm, Favorites.

shot_05.webp.content: Visible: Vital Signs, Airway Intervention/Intubation, Agitation, Anaphylaxis/Allergic Reaction, Antiemetics, Antimicrobials (IV/IM), Antimicrobials (Oral), Burns, Cardiac Resuscitation. Bottom: 10.0 kg, 0y 11m, 76.0 cm, Favorites.

shot_06.png.content: Six big buttons: PEDIATRIC WEIGHT (≤43 kg / ≤94 lbs, scale icon), PEDIATRIC AGE (calendar icon), PEDIATRIC HEIGHT (ruler icon), PEDIATRIC LENGTH TAPE (Broselow color icon), ADULT (>43 kg / >94 lbs), NEONATAL RESUSCITATION (baby icon). Footer note: 'Weight provides the most accurate estimations of dosages and equipment sizes.'

shot_07.webp.content: Same categories as before but now with 20.0 kg, 5y 0m, 114.5 cm patient. Visible bottom: Pain Management, Pressure Support, Procedural Sedation, Respiratory, Seizure/Status Epilepticus, Shock, Toxicology, Trauma, CODE SHEET, EMSC/EIIC

shot_08.webp.content: Top of categories for 20 kg patient: Cardiac Resuscitation, Equipment, Fever, Fluid/Blood Resuscitation, Glasgow Coma Scale, Hypoglycemia, Pain Management, Pressure Support, Procedural Sedation

shot_09.webp.content: Vital Signs, Airway Intervention/Intubation, Agitation, Anaphylaxis/Allergic Reaction, Antiemetics, Antimicrobials (IV/IM), Antimicrobials (Oral), Burns, Cardiac Resuscitation. 20 kg patient.

shot_10.png.content: 'enter weight' prompt with kg unit. Validation: 'weight must be >= 0.5 kg'. Toggle: lb / kg (kg selected). Blue 'continue' button at bottom.

shot_11.png.content: Same home screen as shot_06 (60 kg adult patient likely loaded)

shot_12.png.content: Broselow-style colored list: 3kg (gray, 6.6 lbs), 4kg (gray, 8.8 lbs), 5kg (gray, 11 lbs), 6kg (light pink, 13 lbs), 7kg (pink, 15 lbs), 8kg (red, 17 lbs), 9kg (red, 20 lbs), 10kg (purple, 22 lbs), 11kg (purple, 24 lbs), 12kg (yellow, 26 lbs)

shot_13.webp.content: Neonatal Resuscitation, Gestational Age Estimates, Emergency Medications, Umbilical Catheter, Oxygen Saturation, APGAR score, Crashing Neonate DDX, Neonatal Seizures. Bottom: 3.5 kg, Neonate, Neonate, Favorites.

shot_14.webp.content: Modal: 'Default weight — A default weight of 3500 grams have been set for this section's calculations. For most accurate calculations, it is recommended this is modified by using the bottom bar weight icon once a weight is known.' [ok]

shot_15.png.content: Obstetrical Emergencies, Pain Management, Pressure Management, Procedural Sedation, Respiratory, Seizure/Status Epilepticus, Shock, Toxicology, Trauma, Vital Signs. Bottom: 60.0 kg, IBW 56.9 kg, Favorites.

shot_16.png.content: Burns, Cardiac Resuscitation, Equipment, Fever, Fluid/Blood Resuscitation, Glasgow Coma Scale, Hypoglycemia, Obstetrical Emergencies, Pain Management, Pressure Management. Bottom: 60.0 kg, IBW 56.9 kg, Favorites.

shot_17.webp.content: Airway Intervention/Intubation, Agitation, Alcohol Withdrawal, Anaphylaxis/Allergic Reaction, Anticoagulation Reversal, Antiemetics, Antimicrobials (IV/IM), Burns, Cardiac Resuscitation. Bottom: 60.0 kg, IBW 56.9 kg, Favorites.

shot_18.png.type: Calculate Weight screen with IBW prompt
shot_18.png.content: Weight set to 60 kg. Modal: 'Ideal Body Weight — Would you like to calculate the Ideal Body Weight?' [yes] [no]. Blue 'continue' button.

shot_19.png.content: Height: 160 cm (must be above 143.3 cm). Toggle: male (selected) / female. Result: 'Ideal Body Weight: 56.9 kg'. Green 'continue' button.

shot_20.png.content: Weight: 60 kg. Toggle: lb / kg. Blue 'continue' button.

shot_21.png.content: Height: 60 (must be between 40 and 300.0 cm). Toggle: in / cm (cm selected). Green 'continue' button.

shot_22.png.type: Choose Weight list (3-12 kg, duplicate of 12)
shot_22.png.content: Same as shot_12 — Broselow color list 3-12 kg

shot_32.png.type: Choose Weight list (27-36 kg, continued from 12)
shot_32.png.content: Continued: 27kg (orange, 59 lbs), 28kg (orange, 61 lbs), 29kg (orange, 64 lbs), 30kg (green, 66 lbs), 31kg (green, 68 lbs), 32kg (green, 70 lbs), 33kg (green, 73 lbs), 34kg (green, 75 lbs), 35kg (green, 77 lbs), 36kg (green, 79 lbs)

shot_33.png.content: Continued: 15kg (white, 33 lbs), 16kg (white, 35 lbs), 17kg (white, 37 lbs), 18kg (white, 40 lbs), 19kg (blue, 42 lbs), 20kg (blue, 44 lbs), 21kg (blue, 46 lbs), 22kg (blue, 48 lbs), 23kg (blue, 50 lbs)

shot_34.png.type: Choose Weight list (12-22 kg with color transition)
shot_34.png.content: Color band transition visible: 12kg (yellow, 26 lbs), 13kg (yellow, 28 lbs), 14kg (yellow, 30 lbs) at top, then white 15-18kg, then blue 19-22kg
